$schemaNote: Semantic color tokens are defined in code first and alias primitive colors.
principles: Semantic tokens describe role, not component.
Semantic tokens should be reusable across multiple components.
Semantic tokens should alias primitives, never duplicate raw hex values.
Component tokens should consume semantic tokens rather than primitives.

color.text.muted.comment: Secondary or supporting text on light surfaces.

color.text.on-primary.comment: Text or icons shown on primary brand surfaces.

color.background.primary.hover.comment: Hover state for primary brand-filled surface.

color.background.primary.pressed.comment: Pressed or active state for primary brand-filled surface.

color.border.transparent.comment: Used where border presence should not visually appear.

typography.control.font-family.comment: Shared typography family for control labels.

typography.control.font-size.comment: Shared font size for control labels.

typography.control.font-weight.comment: Shared font weight for control labels.

typography.control.line-height.comment: Shared line height for control labels.

radius.control.default.comment: Default corner radius for interactive controls.

size.icon.small.comment: Compact icon size inside small controls.

space.control.gap.default.comment: Default internal gap for control content.

space.control.padding.block.default.comment: Default block padding for control content.

space.control.padding.inline.default.comment: Default inline padding for control content.

space.control.padding.inline.compact.comment: Compact inline padding, useful when an icon is present.
